outputs.description: The attribute name of the event. ThreatQ.Event.Attribute.Value The attribute value of the event.

outputs.name: ThreatQ.Event.UpdatedAt

outputs.description: The creation date of the event. ThreatQ.Event.Type The type of the event.

outputs.description: The description of the event. ThreatQ.Event.Title The title of the event.
